field.value: Fragment from the Res Gestae Inscription
Fragment from the Res Gestae Divi Augusti inscription at Monumentum Ancyranum.

DIVI.AVG -- VSTI.QVIBVS. / ARVM.QVAS -- IN REM.PVBLICAM. / VAE.SV[N]T.RO -- MAE.POSITAE.EXEMPL / ILIO.ET.PRIVATA.IMPENSA. -- PATRICIORVM.NVMERVM.AVXI.CONSVL.Q / E.FACTIONIS OPPRESSAM -- TVM.TER.LEGI.ET.IN CONSVLATV.SEXTO.CENSV / RETIS HONOR[IFIC]IS IN -- LVSTRVM.POST.ANNVM.ALTERVM.ET.QVADR / CONSVLIBV[S.C]ON[SVLA] -- VM.ROMANORVM.CENSA.SVNT.CAPITA.Q
